title: Finite-Dimensional Operator And Chebyshev Checks

solver_reuse.pressure: The current rows are satisfiable finite norm, operator-bound, and Chebyshev-recurrence witnesses; they teach exact replay but do not yet contain a certificate-bearing bad bound.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote only after adding a false operator-bound, norm inequality, or recurrence row with a source-linked exact-rational artifact; keep Banach-space, Hilbert-space, compact-operator, and general Chebyshev-space theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite-dimensional norm and operator checks as deterministic exact-rational obligations.
Replay matrix/operator witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation.
Add polynomial-basis and interpolation checks before claiming broader approximation coverage.
Keep Banach-space, Hilbert-space, compact-operator, and general Chebyshev-space theorems marked Lean-horizon.
